g.text: ANALYZE Command Data Flow & Memory Layout

g.title: Iterates through data pages in physical storage order.

ol.li: Memory Complexity: Sorter stage requires O(N) memory in current design.
Parallelism: RowIterator may be parallelized across storage partitions using ParallelScan.
Precision: null_fraction is calculated as null_count / (null_count + non_null_count).
Bucket Selection: Boundaries are chosen based on equi-depth distribution to minimize error in cardinality estimation.

g.title: Iterates through data pages in physical storage order.
